title: Samsung just unveiled a Galaxy credit card ahead of Unpacked - Engadget
summary: The entry-level Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 costs $1,500, which would give purchasers $75 as a cash reward. Otherwise, there's a three percent cash reward on purchases made with Samsung Wallet and a two percent reward on streaming service payments.
caption: output/2026-07-20/samsung-just-unveiled-a-galaxy-credit-card-ahead-of-unpacked-engadget.txt
